title: Implement a registry:// alias for docker://
body:
Concerns:
- Need to ensure the configuration in `policy.json` is not ambiguous; that ambiguity check currently exists at transport-level, this requires some kind of merging.
- The `//` are ugly noise, OTOH may be necessary to disambiguate short names in Podman (`registry:2` == “the short name `registry:2` vs. `registry:busybox` == `docker://busybox:latest`). Previously containers/image#1003 .

comments.body: I am looking forward to this change.
Awesome,  This would make me very happy.
Note the more detailed discussion about technical constraints in #516 .
Is `registry://` meant to be for any registry or just docker?
